judgeReasoning: The response explains that `group` organizes navigation, llms.txt sections, search metadata, and AGENTS.md grouping (not decoration). It correctly characterizes /llms-full.txt as a single monolithic all-docs file that is not sharded per group. It lists many valid optional frontmatter fields (icon, deprecated, experimental, canary, new, draft, tags, full, lastModified, lastAuthor), well exceeding the two-field minimum.
